name: M365 Rokid HUD
summary: BLE scooter telemetry HUD for Rokid glasses with real-time Xiaomi M365 data display
description: M365 Rokid HUD connects to Xiaomi M365 scooters via BLE to show real-time telemetry on Rokid AR glasses. The phone app manages BLE and the glasses app renders the HUD. Requires Android 10+ and Bluetooth permissions.
author: zero2005x

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
# About
M365 Rokid HUD is an Android app that connects to Xiaomi/Ninebot M365 electric scooters via Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) and displays real-time telemetry on Rokid AR glasses as a heads-up display (HUD).

# Key Features
- Automatic BLE scanning and discovery of nearby M365 scooters
- Secure pairing with ECDH key exchange and token-based login
- Real-time telemetry including speed, battery, temperature, and mileage
- Remote motor lock/unlock and tail light control
- Signal quality and data freshness indicators on the HUD
- Multi-language support (11 languages)
- Modern UI built with Jetpack Compose and Material3

# How It Works
- The phone app connects to the scooter via BLE and handles all communication.
- Enable the "Rokid HUD Gateway" on the phone app to broadcast telemetry data.
- The Rokid glasses app scans for the phone's gateway and displays telemetry in AR.

# Requirements
- Android 10 (API 29) or higher on the phone
- Bluetooth and Location permissions for BLE scanning
- Rokid AR glasses with the companion HUD app installed

# Notes
- Registration unpairs the scooter from other apps; register only your own devices.
- Disable battery optimization on the phone app to maintain stable BLE connection.
- The HUD shows speed, scooter battery, phone battery, glasses battery, current time, and signal quality.

# Source
[GitHub Repository](https://github.com/zero2005x/M365-Rokid-HUD)

releases.notes:
##  New Features | 新功能

###  Connection Quality Indicator | 連線品質指標
- Real-time signal strength display on glasses HUD
- Stale data warning when telemetry delayed > 2 seconds
- Session statistics: packets, RSSI avg/min/max, reconnect count

###  Battery Optimization | 電池優化
- Phone app now prompts user to disable battery optimization
- Ensures stable BLE gateway service
- Translations in 11 languages

###  Bilingual Documentation | 中英並列文件
- BLE_PROTOCOL_GUIDE.md: Complete bilingual rewrite
- GLASSES_LOG_COLLECTION.md: Phone + glasses log collection guide

###  Bug Fixes
- Fixed native library JNI init crash

---

##  APK Downloads

| APK | Description |
|-----|-------------|
| **app-release.apk** | Phone app (M365 BLE + Rokid Gateway) |
| **glass-hud-release.apk** | Glasses app (Rokid AR HUD) |

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zero2005x/M365-Rokid-HUD/compare/v1.0...v1.1

releases.notes:
# M365 BLE App v1.0.0

🎉 **Initial Release**

## Features

### Phone App (M365-BLE-App)
- 🔍 BLE Scanner - Discover nearby M365 scooters automatically
- 🔐 Secure Registration - ECDH key exchange for first-time pairing
- 🔑 Token-based Login - Fast reconnection with saved credentials
- 📊 Real-time Telemetry - Monitor speed, battery, temperature, and more
- 🔒 Motor Lock/Unlock - Remote scooter control
- 💡 Tail Light Control - Toggle tail light on/off
- 🕶️ Rokid HUD Gateway - Broadcast telemetry to AR glasses
- 🌍 Multi-language Support - 11 languages supported

### Glasses App (M365-Glass-HUD)
- 📺 AR HUD Display - Speed, scooter battery, phone battery, glasses battery, time
- 🔗 Auto-connect to phone Gateway via BLE

## Downloads

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `M365-BLE-App-v1.0.0.apk` | Phone app (Android 10+) |
| `M365-Glass-HUD-v1.0.0.apk` | Rokid glasses HUD app |

## Installation

1. Download the APK for your device
2. Enable "Install from unknown sources" in Android settings
3. Install the APK

## Requirements

- **Phone App**: Android 10 (API 29) or higher
- **Glasses App**: Rokid AR glasses

---

⚠️ **Note**: Registration will unpair the scooter from other apps (e.g., Mi Home). Only register devices you own.
